overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through a New York City street at night during autumn. The scene transitions from an arched commercial building facade past a police car, across an intersection, through a brick building district, and finally approaching a waterfront pier.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with arched commercial buildings

events.description: police car with flashing blue and red emergency lights visible parked at the curb

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk past stone buildings with large arched windows

notable_agents.action: police cruiser with flashing emergency lights parked at the curb

entered.detail: stone building with large arched windows and doorways illuminated by interior lights
trees with orange and yellow autumn foliage lining the street
blue newspaper vending box on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night, passing a grand stone building with arched windows on the left. A police car with flashing lights is parked on the right side of the street, and autumn trees with orange leaves line the curb. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction as the camera follows the character forward.

events.description: exiting covered sidewalk area and entering open intersection crosswalk
traffic light changes from red to green as pedestrians cross

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at the crosswalk, navigating through the intersection

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal suspended over the intersection
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
multi-story building with green awning at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as Spider-Man steps onto the crosswalk. Overhead traffic lights hang above the white-striped crossing while pedestrians move in the same direction. The camera turns slightly right while crossing, revealing a corner building with a green facade across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined sidewalk with historic red brick buildings

events.description: food truck comes into view parked on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in business suit standing near building entrance

entered.detail: classic red brick facades with large windows and decorative doorways
white food truck with purple logo parked at the curb
wooden benches with people sitting along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man continues down a sidewalk lined with historic red brick buildings on the left. The street is lined with autumn trees and parked cars. A white food truck is parked on the right side, and pedestrians in business attire walk along the path. The warm glow of street lamps illuminates the fallen leaves on the pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront pier approach with open water view

events.description: approaching waterfront with pier structure and water visible in the distance
pedestrian crouches to take a photo of Spider-Man with smartphone

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking toward the waterfront pier area with the city skyline visible across the water

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crouching down to take a photograph with smartphone

entered.detail: wooden pier structure extending over the water with string lights
dark water surface reflecting the city lights and night sky
yellow one-way traffic sign mounted on pole

segments.scene_description: The scene opens toward the waterfront as Spider-Man approaches a pier extending over the water. The skyline is visible in the distance across the dark water. A pedestrian on the left crouches to take a photo as Spider-Man passes. The environment becomes more open with full sky visibility and fewer buildings surrounding the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense New York City street at night that gradually opens up toward a wide waterfront pier. It begins on a sidewalk beside a grand stone building with arched windows, passing a police car with flashing lights and orange autumn trees. As the character steps onto a white-striped crosswalk, the scene expands into a wide urban intersection before turning slightly right toward a green-facaded corner building. The camera then follows the path along a row of historic red brick buildings and a white food truck, where the warm glow of street lamps illuminates fallen leaves on the pavement. Finally, the environment opens up as the buildings recede, leading the character toward a pier extending over dark water with the city skyline visible in the distance.
